summary: The Blue Wolf squad, led by Simonan and Beskov, discuss their plan to protect Lady Isabel and eliminate the enemy. Meanwhile, Sir Ric, a skilled warrior, is revealed to be a mercenary who has been hired to protect the group. He is initially seen as untrustworthy but later shows his true strength in battle.
key_moments: The Blue Wolf squad discusses their plan to protect Lady Isabel
Sir Ric's identity as a mercenary is revealed
He proves himself in battle, saving the group from enemy attacks
